Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1F40 "WILDFIRE-1F40" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wildfire.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to allow joystick button in port two to start the game, not just up or down: 1. Patched the JSR $215F instruction at $3628 to be JSR $4000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $4000 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it JMPs to $363A, which causes the game to start just as if up or down was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JMPs to $215F to carry on the normal code flow.
